title: lannea alata
intro: Lannea alata, also known as the broad-leaved karee, is a species of flowering plant in the family Anacardiaceae. It is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lannea alata include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and it can be prepared into herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
